pkgmetadata.longdescription: Python SnowFlakeA library that provides snowflake features to python, including Client and Server. You will not need toThis is extend of httpsgithub.comkoblaspysnowflake with Client adding.See documentations httppysnowflake.readthedocs.orgenlatest_----------Change log----------0.1.3 Fix syntax errors with python 2.7
